name: Cocktail Crab Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the catsup, horseradish, and hot sauce.
2. Remove any remaining filament from the crabmeat.
3. Add the crabmeat to the catsup mixture and continue to blend.
4. Add all other ingredients and blend until smooth.
5. Serve at room temperature. Makes about 2 1/2 cups of dip.
